landingpage.undertitel: Kammerslusen Ribe – a payment system for ships in Ribe. It is a system that makes it easy for ships to pay to pass through the lock, and it also makes it easy for the lock to keep track of which ships have paid and which have not.
landingpage.section1Content: Kammerslusen Ribe is a payment system for ships in Ribe. It is a system that makes it easy for ships to pay to pass through the lock, and it also makes it easy for the lock to keep track of which ships have paid and which have not.

settings.registerBoatDescription: Register a new ship so we can keep track of it in our system and ensure that you are the rightful user of the passage.

footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: This is a school project and not an official product from Ribe Sejlklub. All information and features are fictional and for demonstration purposes only.

termsofservice.title: Terms of Service
termsofservice.introduction: Welcome to Ribe Sejlklub's payment system. By using our services, you agree to comply with these Terms of Service. Please read these terms carefully as they contain important information about your rights and obligations.

section1.title: §1 Delivery
section1.content: When you make a purchase through our payment system, we will endeavor to deliver the purchased service as quickly as possible. In most cases, delivery will occur within a few minutes after the purchase.

section2.title: §2 Right of Withdrawal and Refunds
section2.content: Since this involves the delivery of digital content not supplied on a tangible medium, you accept by completing the purchase that the right of withdrawal expires as soon as the service begins. All sales are in principle final, but contact support@pins.dk in case of technical errors.

section3.title: §3 Disclaimer of Liability
section3.content: Ribe Sejlklub and its payment system are provided 'as is' without any warranty. We disclaim any liability for any damages or losses that may arise from the use of our services.

section4.title: §4 GDPR and Data Protection
section4.content: We comply with applicable data protection legislation, including GDPR. We only collect the necessary information to provide our services and never share your information with third parties without your consent.

section5.title: §5 Security Measures (2FA)
section5.content: To ensure the highest possible protection of your data and prevent unauthorized access, it is an internal requirement that all administrators and developers use two-factor authentication (2FA). This applies to access to all critical systems, including payment gateways (Stripe), infrastructure (Cloudflare), and databases.

section6.title: §6 Cookies and Tracking
section6.content: Our website uses necessary cookies to handle your login and ensure system functionality.

section7.title: §7 Storage of Receipts (Bookkeeping Act)
section7.content: We do not store your card details, as these are handled by Stripe. Pursuant to the Danish Bookkeeping Act, however, we are required to retain receipts and associated transaction data, including your email address, for 5 years from the end of the relevant financial year. This data is stored solely for accounting purposes and cannot be deleted before the period expires.

section8.title: §8 Deletion of Account and Data
section8.content: You can delete your account under 'Settings'. Upon deletion, your personal information is permanently removed from our system. Note, however, that data subject to the Bookkeeping Act (see §7) will be archived for 5 years before final deletion, regardless of whether your user account is active or not.

section9.title: §9 School Project Disclaimer
section9.content: This is a school project and not an official product from Ribe Sejlklub. All information and features are fictional and for demonstration purposes only. Use of the system is at your own risk.

section10.title: §10 Changes to the Terms
section10.content: We reserve the right to change these terms. Any changes will be published on the website, and it is your responsibility to stay informed.

section11.title: §11 Governing Law and Jurisdiction
section11.content: These Terms of Service are governed by Danish law. Any dispute shall be brought before the Danish courts.

section12.title: §12 Contact Information
section12.content: If you have questions regarding these terms, you can contact us at support@pins.dk.

faq.title: Do you have questions?
faq.undertitle: Here are some of the most common questions we receive from our users. If you don't find an answer to your question here, feel free to contact us directly.

questions.question: How do I create an account?
questions.answer: You can create an account by clicking the 'Sign up' button on the front page and filling out the registration form with your details.

questions.question: How do I pay to pass through the lock?
questions.answer: You can pay by logging into your account and following the instructions to complete the payment.

questions.question: What do I do if I have problems with the payment?
questions.answer: If you experience problems with the payment, please contact our support team at support@pins.dk.

questions.question: How can I view my payment history?
questions.answer: You can view your payment history by logging into your account and navigating to the 'History' section.

questions.question: How can I change my account information?
questions.answer: You can change your account information by logging into your account and going to the 'Settings' section, where you can update your details.

HowToPay.title: Payment Process
HowToPay.subtitle: Simple and secure – Electricity payment made easy
HowToPay.description: We use Stripe to handle all transactions, so you can focus on sailing.

step1.title: Reserve amount
step1.description: When you reserve a lock passage, we reserve an amount on your card to ensure you have coverage for the passage. This amount is automatically refunded after the passage.

step2.title: Complete payment
step2.description: We use Stripe, one of the world's most trusted payment providers, to ensure your information is protected throughout the process.

step3.title: Enjoy the passage
step3.description: After the passage, we automatically settle your actual usage. If you reserved too much, we refund the excess amount immediately.
